name: nonempty_map_empty_vec
reason: If provable, to_vec could silently discard all entries from a non-empty map

name: vec_len_exceeds_domain
reason: If provable, to_vec could fabricate extra entries not backed by the underlying map

name: duplicate_keys_in_vec
code:
proof fn phi_3_duplicate_keys_in_vec(h: CKeyHashMap, i: int, j: int)
    requires
        0 <= i < h.spec_to_vec().len(),
        0 <= j < h.spec_to_vec().len(),
        i < j,
        spec_sorted_keys(h.spec_to_vec()),
    ensures
        h.spec_to_vec()[i].k == h.spec_to_vec()[j].k,
{
    h.lemma_to_vec();
}
reason: If provable, the sorted-keys invariant fails to prevent duplicate keys, breaking map semantics

name: value_mismatch_in_vec
reason: If provable, to_vec could associate a key with the wrong value, silently corrupting data

name: roundtrip_failure
reason: If provable, the from_vec/to_vec roundtrip is broken, meaning serialization loses information
